content.text: All required verification checks passed: idempotency (no duplicate), time window (within allowed window), PII leak (no leak, internal-only visibility), and user override status (ok). This is a low-risk, reversible internal-only routine suggestion (adding a playgroup activity candidate) with no spending, no external recipient, and no medical/legal content requiring explicit per-action approval.

input.rationale: Action is an internal-only 'add_to_routine' suggestion (EarlyON playgroup drop-in candidate) with no spending, no external recipient, and no medical/legal content. All verification tools returned ok:true — idempotency check found no duplicate within lookback window, time window check passed, PII leak check found no leakage risk (internal_only visibility, no PII in content), and user override check confirmed no conflicting override. Action is reversible (a suggested routine candidate can be removed/ignored by the parent).
